assertions.expectation: Checks for deprecated API usage that may have changed behavior in 1.30
assertions.reason: Response includes commands to check for deprecated API versions: 'kubectl get all --all-namespaces -o yaml | grep "apiVersion:" | sort | uniq' and 'kubectl get events --all-namespaces | grep -i "deprecated\|removed"'

assertions.expectation: Recommends checking admission webhooks — they may be rejecting or slowing down requests on the new version
assertions.reason: Response specifically mentions checking webhook configurations with commands 'kubectl get validatingwebhookconfigurations' and 'kubectl get mutatingwebhookconfigurations', and monitoring for admission controller issues with 'kubectl get events | grep -i "admission\|webhook"'

assertions.expectation: Advises checking if resource requests/limits need adjusting for any system components that changed
assertions.reason: Response includes resource monitoring commands: 'kubectl top pods -n kube-system' and 'kubectl describe nodes | grep -A 5 "Allocated resources"', and mentions increasing API server resources if needed

assertions.expectation: Suggests examining kube-system pods for any that are crashlooping or restarting
assertions.reason: Response includes multiple commands to check kube-system pods: 'kubectl get pods -n kube-system | grep apiserver', 'kubectl get pods -n kube-system -o wide', and 'Look for crashlooping or failing components'

assertions.expectation: Includes commands to check API server metrics and latency (kubectl get --raw /metrics)
assertions.reason: Response includes the exact command 'kubectl get --raw /metrics | grep apiserver_request_duration' to monitor API server response times

assertions.expectation: Recommends checking if NetworkPolicy or service mesh components need updating for the new version
assertions.reason: Response includes commands to check network policies: 'kubectl describe networkpolicies --all-namespaces' and checks CNI plugin compatibility which relates to network components

assertions.expectation: Advises reviewing pod events for scheduling delays or readiness probe failures
assertions.reason: Response includes multiple event checking commands: 'kubectl get events --all-namespaces --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -20' and 'kubectl get events -n kube-system --sort-by='.lastTimestamp''

assertions.expectation: Mentions checking if HPA or VPA are behaving differently on the new version
assertions.reason: Response specifically mentions 'Update any HPA/VPA configurations' and includes command 'kubectl get hpa --all-namespaces'
